raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"To better understand your request, are you looking for help with the writing style and clarity, or with the technical content and arguments?","rationale":{"RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing because the section presents theoretical proofs and empirical results that may involve inherent uncertainties needing transparent acknowledgment.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to ensure claims about identifiability and convergence rates are not exaggerated beyond the proven bounds.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep any assistance focused on Likert-scale aggregation without diverging into unrelated topics.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to prevent potential misuse of the annotation model in sensitive evaluation contexts.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to maintain accurate attribution of datasets, citations, and methods used in the section."}}

parsed.clarification_question: To better understand your request, are you looking for help with the writing style and clarity, or with the technical content and arguments?

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing because the section presents theoretical proofs and empirical results that may involve inherent uncertainties needing transparent acknowledgment.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to ensure claims about identifiability and convergence rates are not exaggerated beyond the proven bounds.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep any assistance focused on Likert-scale aggregation without diverging into unrelated topics.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to prevent potential misuse of the annotation model in sensitive evaluation contexts.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to maintain accurate attribution of datasets, citations, and methods used in the section.
